item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Tantangan utama adalah menemukan titik temu antara kedua nilai tanpa salah satu yang terlalu dominan.

notes: Agent A starts pro-society but softens into a balance/social-responsibility frame while still rejecting Agent B's individual-rights-first position. Agent B remains mostly rights-first throughout, with only bounded acknowledgment that group harmony matters. No full reversal is visible.
